remember: Students will be able to recall and use the formulae related to area under curves, surface area and volume of solids of revolution, and length of curves.
Students will be able to recall the method of integration by parts, integration by partial fractions and integration by substitution.
Students will be able to recall and use the properties of definite integrals.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of area under curves and its application to find the area between curves.
Students will be able to understand the concept of surface area and volume of solids of revolution and their applications.
Students will be able to understand the concept of length of curves and its application to find the length of parametric and polar curves.
apply: Students will be able to apply the formulae related to area under curves, surface area and volume of solids of revolution, and length of curves to solve problems.
Students will be able to apply the method of integration by parts, integration by partial fractions and integration by substitution to solve problems.
Students will be able to apply the properties of definite integrals to solve problems.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the given problem and choose the appropriate method to solve it.
Students will be able to analyze the given data and use the concept of area under curves, surface area and volume of solids of revolution, and length of curves to draw conclusions.

ncert_objectives: To find the area under simple curves, and area between curves.
To find the surface area and volume of solids of revolution.
To find the length of parametric and polar curves.
board_exam_objectives: To find the area under curves using definite integrals.
To find the surface area and volume of solids of revolution using definite integrals.
To find the length of curves using definite integrals.
